description_long: A hearty steak sits atop a round, light-colored plate, accompanied by a cross-section slice revealing a bone at its center. The steak is thick and rectangular with a reddish-brown, seared exterior marked by faint crosshatch grill marks. A large bone protrudes from one end, and a juicy, marbled slice is placed beside the main cut, displaying a vibrant red interior. Underneath the steak and slice, a couple of green leaves serve as garnish, adding a touch of color contrast. The plate is simple and slightly raised, providing a clean presentation. The overall appearance suggests a freshly cooked, medium-rare steak ready to be served in a casual urban dining setting.
description: A thick, seared steak with a bone and a juicy cross-section slice sits on a round plate with green garnish. The steak features faint crosshatch grill marks and a vibrant red interior.
description_view_0: The steak is shown from the side, highlighting the rectangular cut, bone protrusion, and a red slice with visible marbling on a plate with green garnish.
description_view_1: The steak is viewed from the bone end, clearly displaying the round bone in the center of the cross-section slice and the green garnish beneath.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the steak is visible, showing the thick cut, the red slice to the left, and the green garnish peeking out from underneath.
description_view_3: The steak is seen from the back, focusing on the rounded end and bone, with the green garnish and plate more prominent.
attribute_grill_marks: Faint crosshatch grill marks are visible on the top surface of the steak.
attribute_garnish_or_plating_style: A couple of green leaves are used as garnish beneath the steak and slice.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Light fat marbling is visible, mostly concentrated in the cross-section slice.
